# Musharraf Kazi — AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer

> Personal portfolio of Musharraf Kazi (also known as Kazi Musharraf, MK Knight), an India-based AI Engineer, AI Systems Architect, and Indie Product Builder.

## About

Musharraf Kazi is an AI Engineer specializing in Agentic AI, Multi-LLM Routing, Developer Tools, and Full-Stack Product Development. He builds AI-powered applications, SaaS products, and developer tools using modern web technologies and multiple AI model providers.

## Expertise

- AI Engineering: Agentic AI, Multi-LLM Routing, RAG, Tool Calling, Agent Memory
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Three.js, Motion Design
- Backend: Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Django, Flask, Express, REST APIs
- Data: PostgreSQL, Supabase, Firebase, pgvector, Vector Databases
- AI Providers: Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini, Groq, Ollama
- Infrastructure: Vercel, Cloudflare, Docker, GitHub Actions, Serverless

## Projects

This portfolio showcases 60+ shipped projects across AI, full-stack development, frontend engineering, backend systems, and developer tools.
